zh.lifeSummary: 當William Cullen III於大約1546年出生在英國薩默塞特巴斯時，他的父親Sir William Cullen II35歲，母親llsa McMurdocke21歲。他於1569年10月22日與Jone Millard在英國薩默塞特巴斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1592年8月31日在他的家鄉享年47歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特巴斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Cullen III于大约1546年出生在英国薩默塞特巴斯时，他的父亲Sir William Cullen II35岁，母亲llsa McMurdocke21岁。他于1569年10月22日与Jone Millard在英国薩默塞特巴斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他去世于1592年8月31日在他的家乡享年47岁，埋葬在英国英格兰薩默塞特巴斯。

nameMeanings.name: Cullen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Declan, Dermot, Donal, Fergus, Aidan, Brennan, Donovan, Eamon, Eamonn, Kieran, Liam.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Cuileáin ‘descendant of Cuileán’, a variant of the personal name Coileán meaning ‘puppy’ or ‘young hound’ (see Collin ).
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Cuilinn ‘descendant of Cuileann’, a byname meaning ‘holly’.

variants.name: Collin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Marcel, Leonide, Andre, Armand, Camille, Emile, Fernand, Firmin, Francois, Ghislaine, Normand.
English, French, Walloon, and Breton: variant of   Colin  . This surname is also found in the Flemish part of Belgium.
German: variant of   Kollin   and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

variants.name: Cullinan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Cormac.
Irish (Clare): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Cuileannáin ‘descendant of Cuileannán’, from a diminutive of Cuileann (see Cullen 2).

variants.name: Cullens
meanings: Scottish: variant of Cullen , with excrescent or genitival -s.
Dutch (Rotterdam): possibly an adaptation of English   Collins  .

variants.name: Cullin
meanings: Irish (Longford and Roscommon) and English: variant of   Cullen  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When William Cullen III was born about 1546, in Bath, Somerset, England, his father, Sir William Cullen II, was 35 and his mother, llsa McMurdocke, was 21. He married Jone Millard on 22 October 1569, in Bath, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 8 daughters. He died on 31 August 1592, in his hometown, at the age of 47, and was buried in Bath, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Cullen III est né environ 1546, à Bath, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Cullen II, avait 35 ans et sa mère, llsa McMurdocke, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Jone Millard le 22 octobre 1569, à Bath, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé le 31 août 1592, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à Bath, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Oktober 1569 in Bath, Somerset, England Jone Millard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Er starb am 31. ja.lifeSummary: William Cullen IIIが約1546年にイギリスソメルセトバスで生まれた時，父Sir William Cullen IIは35歳，母llsa McMurdockeは21歳であった。1569年10月22日にイギリスソメルセトバスでJone Millardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1592年8月31日に故郷で47歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトバスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Cullen III(이)가 대략 1546년 영국 서머세트 바스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Cullen II(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 llsa McMurdocke(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1569년 10월 22일 영국 서머세트 바스에서 Jone Millard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1592년 8월 31일 그의 고향에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 바스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Cullen III nasceu aproximadamente 1546, em Bath, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Cullen II, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, llsa McMurdocke, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Jone Millard em 22 de outubro de 1569, em Bath, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 8 filhas. Ele faleceu em 31 de agosto de 1592, em sua cidade natal, com 47 anos, e foi sepultado em Bath, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Cullen III родился около 1546 г. в местности бат, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Cullen II было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали llsa McMurdocke, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Jone Millard 22 октября 1569 г. в местности бат, сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 8 дочерей. Он умер 31 августа 1592 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности бат, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Jone Millard el 22 de octubre de 1569, en Bath, Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió el 31 de agosto de 1592, en su pueblo, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultado en Bath, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
